# PaigeAgent.ai

> The AI operating system for client-based businesses — an AI-powered platform that turns client management, automation, and execution into one connected growth engine for coaches, consultants, and agencies.

PaigeAgent.ai (by Mogul Maker Academy) is an AI business-operations and CRM platform. Paige is an AI teammate that manages client relationships, automates everyday workflows, drafts outreach, handles scheduling and reminders, organizes a knowledge base, and coaches business strategy. The platform serves coaches, consultants, and agencies running client-based businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing, and signup.
- [About](/about): Company mission, founder, and the 3M framework (Make / Manage / Multiply).
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How PaigeAgent.ai collects, protects, and uses your business data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Platform terms, compliance disclosures, and acceptable use.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on client management, workflow automation, and entrepreneurship.
- [Affiliate Program](/affiliates): Apply to refer entrepreneurs and earn commissions.
- [Broker Program](/broker): Apply to use Paige as a white-label workspace for your clients.
